races.name: Grand Prix de Denain - Porte du Hainaut
races.description: The 67th edition of the so-called 'mini Paris-Roubaix' packs 22.9 km of cobbles across 13 sectors (six shared with Paris-Roubaix itself) into a 200 km circuit around Denain, serving as a key early-season test for classics specialists ahead of the Hell of the North.

broadcasts.notes: Discovery+ subscription £30.99/month; also available via TNT Sports on pay-TV packages
Free-to-air on the French TNT digital terrestrial network; live coverage from 14:00 CET (13:00 GMT). Stream also available on channel website.
Free live stream on sporza.be; geo-restricted to Belgium — use a VPN from abroad
Eurosport shows final ~2 hours live on Eurosport 1 channel and via Discovery+ or HBO Max streaming depending on territory; subscription required

data_confidence.notes: Race details (distance, route, start time, favourites) verified across multiple sources. Broadcast platforms confirmed for UK, US, Canada, France, Belgium and pan-European Eurosport. Exact stream start times for US/Canada/Belgium are estimated at 13:00 GMT based on UK confirmed time; the Novo 19 start (14:00 CET = 13:00 GMT) is confirmed from a French source. The Novo 19 stream URL (novo19.fr) is the broadcaster's known domain but the specific live page URL was not directly verified. FloBikes availability confirmed as Canada-only for this race (US rights held by HBO Max). No women's race or other UCI-level race confirmed for this date.

issues: Only one UCI-level race confirmed for 2026-03-19: Grand Prix de Denain 1.Pro (men). No women's WorldTour or ProSeries race found for this date. PCS homepage and TNT Sports WorldTour calendar both confirm no WT or WWT races on this day.
No official race website found for GP Denain; official_site set to null.
Novo 19 stream URL (https://www.novo19.fr) is the broadcaster's main domain; the specific live-stream page URL was not directly fetched and verified — listed with medium confidence.

FloBikes broadcast page (https://www.flobikes.com/events/15255396-2026-gp-de-denain-porte-du-hainaut) confirmed as Canada-only; a separate FloBikes page listed start time as Mar 20 UTC, likely a timezone display error — race is confirmed March 19.
Sporza broadcast confirmed by Cycling Weekly for this race but exact GMT start time not found — listed as 'Check listings'.
Race status set to 'upcoming' based on PCS live feed showing preview mode at time of generation; update to 'live' or 'finished' as appropriate during/after the race.
Finish time 15:45 CET (14:45 UTC) is an estimate from multiple preview sources; actual finish may vary by up to 15 minutes.
